home.hero_subtitle: Confused about what to do next? Explore higher education and vocational training opportunities in Sri Lanka tailored for school leavers.
home.features_1_desc: From IT and Engineering to Healthcare and Hospitality.
home.features_2_desc: Details directly from NVQ and national gazettes.
home.features_3_desc: Practical steps to start earning and learning.

about.title: About PathFinder
about.p1: PathFinder is an educational career guidance initiative designed specifically for Sri Lankan school leavers.
about.p2: Our mission is to help O/L and A/L students understand that University is not the only path to a successful career. By highlighting government-backed vocational training courses (NVQ) and creating tailored pathway recommendations, we aim to build a skilled, competent, and highly employable youth demographic in Sri Lanka.
about.p3: We rely on transparent data from the Vocational Training Authority (VTA) and other national entities to provide reliable advice directly to students.

careerFields.title: Explore Career Fields
careerFields.subtitle: Discover structured career profiles and the vocational pathways to enter them.
careerFields.card_desc: Explore various sub-disciplines, potential earnings, and starting NVQ levels.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Need specific guidance? We can connect you to the appropriate government counseling services or vocational training centers.

email.title: Email Support
email.desc: Send us an email for detailed queries.

opportunities.title: Latest Opportunities & Gazettes
opportunities.subtitle: Stay updated with the latest government gazettes, vocational training intakes, and professional courses available for school leavers across Sri Lanka.
opportunities.empty_state: No current openings found for this category. Please check back later.

pathwayFinder.title: Pathway Finder
pathwayFinder.subtitle: Answer a few questions to find the best education and career options for you.

step1.title: What is your highest completed education level?

ol.title: G.C.E. O/L
ol.desc: I have completed my Ordinary Level exams.

al.title: G.C.E. A/L
al.desc: I have completed my Advanced Level exams.

step2.title: How did you perform? (Optional)
step2.desc: This helps us recommend the exact NVQ level or foundation course you are eligible for.
step2.label: Select your overall result range:
step2.alert_desc: Even if you didn't pass, there are many vocational pathways available that start from the basics.

step3.title: What fields interest you the most?

step4.title: Your Recommended Pathways
step4.subtitle: Based on your profile, here are the best next steps for you.

ol_it.title: Diploma in IT / Software Engineering
ol_it.desc: Start with an NVQ Level 4 certificate in IT directly after O/Ls.

ol_eng.title: Certificate in Auto Mechanics / Electrical
ol_eng.desc: Join a Technical College for hands-on engineering skills.

al_it.title: HND in Computing
al_it.desc: A 2-year Higher National Diploma leading to a top-up degree.

al_eng.title: NDT / HNDE
al_eng.desc: National Diploma in Technology or Engineering for A/L physical science students.

al_bus.title: AAT / Charted Accountancy Foundation
al_bus.desc: Start your professional finance journey immediately.

fallback_counseling.title: Career Guidance Counseling
fallback_counseling.desc: Visit your nearest NAITA branch for personalized counseling.

fallback_al.title: Open University Sri Lanka
fallback_al.desc: Explore foundation courses in your area of interest.

fallback_ol.title: Vocational Training Authority (VTA)
fallback_ol.desc: Find certificates in various trades starting at NVQ Level 3.
